# Test Plan

> 日本語: [TEST_PLAN.ja.md](TEST_PLAN.ja.md)

## Policy

EspUsbDevice is intended to become a generally useful USB Device library. The
test plan starts from EspUsbHost peer and loopback scenarios because they give a
clear, repeatable way to validate the low-level API and descriptors on real
hardware.

Tests are organized by how much of the environment can be controlled by
software.

**Automated tests** run without manual operation. Inputs are generated by the
test code and expected outputs are asserted.

**Manual tests** are reserved for cases where physical hardware, host OS
enumeration, cabling, or visual inspection is part of the behavior being
verified.

```text
tests/
  unit/       Automated - descriptor builders and report helpers.
  peer/       Automated - two boards: EspUsbHost host + EspUsbDevice device.
  loopback/   Automated - one ESP32-P4 running host and device roles.
  probe/      Bring-up - port/speed/PHY identification and OS enumeration.
  manual/     Manual - physical devices or human inspection required.
```

## Coverage Plan

| Feature | Unit | Peer | Loopback | Probe | Manual |
|---------|------|------|----------|-------|--------|
| Device descriptor config | ✅ `descriptor` | | | planned | |
| FS/HS endpoint MPS | ✅ `descriptor` | planned | planned | planned | |
| HID keyboard raw report | ✅ `descriptor` | ✅ `hid_keyboard` | builds `hid_keyboard` | | |
| HID keyboard LED output report | ✅ callback mapping | ✅ `hid_keyboard` | MVP | | optional |
| HID mouse raw report | ✅ descriptor | ✅ `hid_mouse` | planned | | |
| Keyboard + mouse composite | ✅ descriptor | ✅ `hid_keyboard_mouse` | planned | | |
| Custom HID report descriptor | planned | planned | | | |
| HID vendor IN/OUT/Feature | planned | planned | | | |
| Consumer/system/gamepad HID | planned | planned | | | |
| CDC ACM | | planned | planned | | |
| USB MIDI | | planned | | | |
| USB MSC | | planned | | | |
| USB Audio | | planned | | | |

## Initial Migration Order

1. `unit/compile_smoke`
2. `unit/descriptor`
3. ✅ `peer/hid_keyboard`
4. ✅ `peer/hid_mouse`
5. `peer/hid_keyboard_mouse`
6. `probe/p4_device_fs_probe`
7. `probe/p4_device_hs_probe`
8. `loopback/hid_keyboard`
9. `peer/custom_hid`
10. `peer/hid_vendor`
11. `peer/hid_consumer_control`
12. `peer/hid_system_control`
13. `peer/hid_gamepad`
14. `peer/usb_serial`
15. `peer/usb_midi`
16. `peer/usb_msc`
17. `peer/usb_audio`

## Acceptance Rules

- Descriptor tests must assert bytes, not only log them.
- `unit/compile_smoke` must verify Arduino CLI, sketch.yaml, ESP32 board package,
  and library resolution in build-only mode.
- Peer tests must use serial commands to drive the device board.
- Device sketches must not call Arduino-ESP32 `USB.begin()`.
- P4 tests must print selected port, requested speed, TinyUSB rhport, connected
  speed when available, VID/PID, interface count, and endpoint MPS.
- Unsupported P4 port/speed combinations must be explicit `xfail` or documented
  probe results, not silent skips.
